mapper.select: SELECT * FROM observability_events WHERE event_id = #{eventId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO observability_events (event_id, user_id, event_type, question_length, model_id, channel_id, session_id, workspace_id, result, response_duration_ms, client_version, client_platform, client_os_version, created_at) VALUES (#{eventId}, #{userId}, #{eventType}, #{questionLength}, #{modelId}, #{channelId}, #{sessionId}, #{workspaceId}, #{result}, #{responseDurationMs}, #{clientVersion}, #{clientPlatform}, #{clientOsVersion}, #{createdAt})
